questions.text: If you stay with us for three days,
If you decide not to vote in the election,
If you didn't eat your lunch so fast,
If there were a few more people working,
If you forget to take your passport,
If the hire car isn't there when you arrive,
If the city continues to expand,
If the police didn't fine people,
If you did decide to leave the company,

options.text: we might get served a bit more quickly.
give us a call and we'll come to pick you up.
very few people would obey the law.
you wouldn't get hiccups, would you?
they have to go through a complicated procedure.
we'd be happy to give you a good reference.
I'm pretty sure they won't let you check in.
more areas of natural beauty will be destroyed.
we'll have enough time to see a few sights.
you can't really complain about the government.
